title: White Permanent Vinyl for Cricut - 12" x 5FT White Permanent Vinyl Roll, Outdoor Self Adhesive Vinyl Roll for Decor Sticker, Party Decoration
features: GLOSSY COLOR - 12" x 5Ft Glossy white permanent vinyl roll for cri-cut, household manual DIY.Notice: NOT SUIT FOR FABRIC.
COMPATIBLE WITH ALL CRAFT CUTTERS - The permanent vinyl are compatible with cri-cut, silhouette, cameo cutters.The cri-cut machine needs to be set in "Iron on +".
EASY TO CUT & TRANSFER - Thicker bottom paper is not easy to be carved through. Moderate viscosity makes you smoother in weeding and transfering vinyl.
WIDELY USE - These permanent holographic vinyls are durable enough for repeated washing, and can be applied to Metal, Plastic, Glass, Wood, Mirror and Ceramic.

LIFETIME WARRANTY - We're sure you'll love your sparkle vinyl. But if you have any problems, just let us know & we provide lifetime warranty. Note: Please attempt to pre-cut and set a proper size before you officially do it to eliminate errors, If it gets better, keep lowering the blade until the problem is gone.

WARM TIPS - NOT HTV, NOT PRINTABLE VINYL. Perform pre-cut before use, and set it to "Iron on +" when used in Cricut machines. It is not recommended to use a dishwasher, which will cause a certain degree of wear on the mirror surface.
description: Product Description For Most Craft Cutting Machines Lya Vinyl Permanent Vinyl Roll for Cricut Lya Vinyl is a brand specializing in the production of Vinyl Paper. We specialize in the production and sale of Vinyl materials. Lya Vinyl will make continuous efforts to provide high quality products and services to our customers. Permanent Adhesive Vinyl Rolls are safe to handle and use, are waterproof, as well as light-resistant. Cut out patterns, shapes or words for mugs, Glass Mirrors, birthday presents and more! Everyone will be amazed Lya Adhesive Vinyl's incredible colors. Start Colorful Projects with our Permanent Vinyl Roll
